health_informatics_missing_courses.title: Healthcare Systems and Delivery
health_informatics_missing_courses.description: Comprehensive overview of healthcare delivery systems, organizational structures, and stakeholders in the healthcare industry. Students learn about healthcare financing, policy, and the role of technology in transforming healthcare delivery models.
learning_objectives: Understand healthcare delivery system components and stakeholders
Analyze healthcare financing and reimbursement models
Evaluate healthcare policy and regulatory frameworks
Assess the impact of technology on healthcare delivery
Compare international healthcare systems and models
covered_materials: Quality improvement and patient safety initiatives

health_informatics_missing_courses.title: Medical Terminology
health_informatics_missing_courses.description: Systematic study of medical language including anatomical terms, disease processes, diagnostic procedures, and treatment modalities. Students develop proficiency in medical vocabulary essential for healthcare communication and documentation.
learning_objectives: Master fundamental medical terminology and word construction
Understand anatomical and physiological terminology
Apply medical terminology in clinical documentation contexts
Interpret medical abbreviations and symbols
Communicate effectively using appropriate medical language

health_informatics_missing_courses.title: Health Data Management
health_informatics_missing_courses.description: Principles and practices of health data collection, storage, and management including data quality, governance, and lifecycle management. Students learn to ensure data integrity and accessibility while maintaining privacy and security standards.
learning_objectives: Implement health data governance and quality management
Apply data lifecycle management principles
Ensure data integrity and accuracy in health systems
Understand data warehousing and business intelligence
Evaluate data sharing and interoperability requirements

health_informatics_missing_courses.title: Healthcare Database Systems
health_informatics_missing_courses.description: Design, implementation, and management of database systems for healthcare applications. Students learn to create efficient database structures for clinical and administrative data while ensuring performance and scalability.
learning_objectives: Design healthcare-specific database schemas
Implement database security and access controls
Optimize database performance for healthcare applications
Understand clinical data modeling and standards
Apply database integration and migration strategies

health_informatics_missing_courses.title: Health Information Systems
health_informatics_missing_courses.description: Comprehensive study of health information systems including clinical, administrative, and specialty systems. Students learn system selection, implementation, and optimization while understanding workflow integration and user adoption strategies.
learning_objectives: Evaluate and select appropriate health information systems
Manage system implementation and workflow integration
Optimize system performance and user satisfaction
Understand system interoperability and data exchange
Apply change management principles in system deployment
covered_materials: Health information system categories and functions

health_informatics_missing_courses.title: Telemedicine and Digital Health
health_informatics_missing_courses.description: Exploration of telemedicine technologies, digital health applications, and remote patient monitoring systems. Students learn about telehealth delivery models, technology requirements, and regulatory considerations for virtual care.
learning_objectives: Understand telemedicine technologies and delivery models
Evaluate digital health applications and mobile health solutions
Assess remote patient monitoring and wearable technologies
Analyze telehealth policy and regulatory requirements
Develop telehealth program implementation strategies
covered_materials: Virtual reality and augmented reality in healthcare
Reimbursement and billing for telehealth services
Patient engagement and digital health literacy

health_informatics_missing_courses.title: Health Information Security
health_informatics_missing_courses.description: Specialized study of cybersecurity principles applied to healthcare environments including HIPAA compliance, risk assessment, and incident response. Students learn to protect health information and maintain system security in healthcare organizations.
learning_objectives: Implement HIPAA security and privacy regulations
Conduct healthcare-specific risk assessments
Develop incident response plans for healthcare breaches
Apply security controls for health information systems
Understand emerging security threats in healthcare
covered_materials: HIPAA Security Rule and Privacy Rule requirements
Security awareness training for healthcare staff

health_informatics_missing_courses.title: Healthcare Quality Management
health_informatics_missing_courses.description: Application of quality management principles and methodologies to healthcare organizations including quality measurement, improvement initiatives, and patient safety programs. Students learn to use data and informatics to drive quality improvements.
learning_objectives: Apply quality management principles to healthcare settings
Develop quality measurement and monitoring systems
Implement patient safety and risk reduction programs
Use informatics tools for quality improvement
Evaluate healthcare quality initiatives and outcomes
covered_materials: Root cause analysis and failure mode analysis

health_informatics_missing_courses.title: Clinical Decision Support Systems
health_informatics_missing_courses.description: Design and implementation of clinical decision support systems including alerts, reminders, and clinical guidelines. Students learn to develop evidence-based decision support tools that improve clinical outcomes and efficiency.
learning_objectives: Design effective clinical decision support interventions
Implement evidence-based clinical guidelines
Evaluate decision support system effectiveness
Understand clinical workflow integration
Apply artificial intelligence to clinical decision support
covered_materials: Clinical decision support system types and functions
Medication management and drug interaction alerts
